overview.short: Avchitgad is a fort located in the Sahyadri ranges of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Avchitgad is a fort located in the Sahyadri ranges of Maharashtra. The fort is situated near Roha in the Raigad district. At the base of this fort is a village called Medha and Padam - Kharapti.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Roha
topPlaces.description: Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.

topPlaces.name: Roha Ashtami
topPlaces.description: Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Nagothane
topPlaces.description: Nagothane is a census town in Roha Taluka, in the Raigad district of the Indian state of Maharashtra. The Kanyakumari-Panvel National Highway, famously known as Mumbai-Goa Highway (NH66) goes through this town.

topPlaces.name: Dhatau
topPlaces.description: Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Karanja, Raigad
topPlaces.description: Karanja or Uran Island is a town in Uran, Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, about eight miles (13 km) long and four miles (6.4 km) broad. It lies in the south-east of Mumbai Harbour, about six miles (9.7 km) miles south-east of the Carnac pier in Mumbai (Bombay).

topPlaces.name: Birwadi fort
topPlaces.description: Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. Birwadi village is about 3 km away from Chanera village, which is on the Roha–Salav road.

items.note: Roha (Marathi: रोहा) is a town and the headquarters of Roha taluka in the Raigad district of Maharashtra, India. It is located 120km south-east of Mumbai, in the Konkan region of western India.
Roha Ashtami is a twin city and a municipal council in the Raigad district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

Nagothane is a census town in Roha Taluka, in the Raigad district of the Indian state of Maharashtra. The Kanyakumari-Panvel National Highway, famously known as Mumbai-Goa Highway (NH66) goes through this town.
Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

Karanja or Uran Island is a town in Uran, Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, about eight miles (13 km) long and four miles (6.4 km) broad. It lies in the south-east of Mumbai Harbour, about six miles (9.7 km) miles south-east of the Carnac pier in Mumbai (Bombay).

Birwadi fort (Marathi: बिरवाडी किल्ला) is hill fortress located in the village of Birwadi in Roha taluka, Raigad district, Maharashtra, India. Birwadi village is about 3 km away from Chanera village, which is on the Roha–Salav road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Avchitgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Avchitgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Avchitgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Avchitgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Avchitgad?
faq.a: Stays in Avchitgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Avchitgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Roha, Roha Ashtami, Nagothane, Dhatau, Karanja, Raigad.
